homePage.title: Gathering people who help others connect with nature.
homePage.mission: We gather to cultivate depth through community building, engage broadly through networking, and steward care for life by generously sharing skills, knowledge, and lived experience.
howItWorks: Seasonal gatherings convene members around practical themes and facilitated connection.
Unconference-style sessions create room for peer learning, collaboration, and emergent topics.
Members contribute resources, referrals, and lessons learned from real-world practice.

highlightCards.title: For practitioners and educators
highlightCards.description: A professional community for people weaving nature connection into their work.

highlightCards.title: Rooted in practice
highlightCards.description: Tools, stories, and methods are shared in plain language and grounded in experience.

highlightCards.title: Participation first
highlightCards.description: Join events, contribute ideas, and help shape the direction of the community.

pages.title: Connect With Others
pages.intro: Find clear pathways to connect with members, conversations, and collaboration opportunities across the community.

pages.title: About Nature Connected Professionals
pages.intro: Nature Connected Professionals is a member-powered network supporting people who use nature connection in counseling, education, health, and community practice.

events.title: Summer Field Practice Circle
events.location: Theodore Wirth Regional Park, Minneapolis, MN
events.summary: A practical evening focused on peer exchange, reflection, and in-the-field facilitation techniques.
events.details: Participants will explore guided prompts, partner dialogue, and shared skill-building around nature-based professional practice.

events.title: Winter Solstice Gathering
events.summary: A community evening focused on connection during the longest night.
events.details: Included shared practice, reflection, and facilitated group activities.

events.title: Spring Networking Walk
events.summary: A seasonal gathering to reconnect, share current work, and build new professional relationships.
events.details: Participants will move through guided introductions, small-group exchange, and a closing reflection focused on practical collaboration opportunities.

directoryMembers.certifications: Advanced Nature-Based Therapist Certification from Human Nature Counseling

directoryMembers.services:
Outdoor guiding
Teaching outdoor skills
Nature Immersion
